hero.description: Hi, I'm Elliot. At 23, I'm based in the heart of the Lille metropolitan area. My journey began in lines of code, where pure logic meets creation. Today, I'm rising to become the central pillar of web projects: a manager who speaks the language of developers while translating clients' business needs. My vision? Creating a fusion between technical innovation and human-centered support.

skills.intro: From technical design to project management, my skills cover the full web development lifecycle. Here are the areas of expertise I bring to make your ambitions a reality.
